item.title: Demon Lord Reborn
item.description:
Book Introduction

After being betrayed by his twelve knights, the Demon Lord is reborn in the body of a weak village boy. He must hide his power, gather new followers, and take revenge on the empire that destroyed his kingdom.

Full novel includes 28 chapters, complete ending, no cliffhangers.
